prompt: Generate a photorealistic urban street scene guided by this semantic segmentation mask, depicting cars, a pedestrian, trees, and road layout based on the colored regions provided in the reference.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic urban street scene, accurately following the semantic segmentation mask in image 1. The scene features a central asphalt road (purple) flanked by pink sidewalks and numerous parked cars (blue) lining both sides. A red pedestrian is walking in the middle of the street. Green trees are visible along the upper-left and upper-right edges, behind the cars. Yellow traffic signs and poles are present along the street, including a triangular sign on the right. A dark sky forms the backdrop.
objects: numerous parked cars lining both sides
a red pedestrian walking in the middle of the street
green trees along the upper-left and upper-right edges, behind the cars
yellow traffic signs along the street
a triangular sign on the right
